info.title: Galaxy Workflow API
info.description: Execute AI workflows programmatically. Authenticate with a Bearer API key (`gal_…`). Rate limits apply per API key via Unkey. Outbound webhooks emit run lifecycle events.

put.description: Replace nodes, edges, and viewport. Supports optimistic concurrency via `expectedVersion`.

post.description: Enqueue a workflow run. Poll `GET /api/v1/runs/{runId}` until status is terminal. Optionally pass `idempotencyKey` to safely retry.

get.description: Returns run metadata and all node runs with outputs.

post.description: Cancel a queued or running workflow run.

get.description: Public node definitions for building workflows.
Returns masked keys (prefix only). Full secrets are shown once at creation.

201.description: API key created — store the secret immediately
Webhook registered — store the signing secret immediately

get.description: Public upload limits and whether uploads are enabled.

post.description: Multipart upload. Field name must be `file`.

BearerAuth.description: Galaxy API key prefixed with `gal_`. Example: `Authorization: Bearer gal_live_…`

InsufficientCredits.description: Not enough credits to start the run
